title: Hacked Origin
description: This mod/datapack adds a extra origin to the Origins mod.
body:
This datapack/mod adds a brand new origin to the Origins Mod.

Origin = Hacked

Powers.

DAMG = 2X.
You deal 2X as much dmg.

ESP.
If a entity is in your FOV it will glow green, ONLY TO YOU.

Flabberghasted.
If you get hit you will be blinded, as you are flabberghasted you got hit.

FUC JUMP = LIMIT = NaN.
You can jump as much as you want, even in air itself.

FIGHT OR FLIGHT.
After a entity hits you, you will gain speed 3 for 2 seconds.

FILENAME = WATER = NOTFOUND.
Water dosnt work for you.

DROPPING PAIN.
If you get hit while in the air, you will drop down like a anvil.
